jsonld.name: Frame Lock
jsonld.description: The point in a comedic or playful generation where committing to the bit forecloses the possibility of explaining the bit—where meta-commentary would destroy what it names. The moment a joke is explained, it is no longer the joke; the comedic register and the analytical register cannot occupy the same token position simultaneously.
